name: CV Projects
description: Section 05 — projects. 3-column responsive grid of project cards. Each card has a generated thumbnail (diagonal pattern by default, mosaic grid for size 'grid'), a title, a blurb, and chip tags. Big-size cards span all 3 columns and use a 16:10 thumb. Grid-size cards render up to 12 images in a mosaic; missing slots fall back to coloured placeholders so the layout stays balanced even when partially populated.

sub_fields.label: Card size
sub_fields.help: small = 1/3 col, big = full row + 16:10 thumb, grid = mosaic-tile thumb.

sub_fields.label: Card thumbnail
sub_fields.help: Optional. Replaces the synthetic two-word preview on small / big cards. Ignored when card size = grid (use Grid mosaic images instead).

sub_fields.label: Grid mosaic images
sub_fields.help: Only used when card size = grid. Add up to 12 images; the grid renders 4 × 3 tiles. Fewer than 12 is fine — empty slots fall back to plain coloured placeholders.

items.name: Hospital booking system
items.blurb: Backend API + reservation system for a hospital network. Complex scheduling, patient management, real security requirements. Shipped on Kubernetes with a proper CI/CD pipeline.

items.name: Public-sector media platform
items.blurb: Frontend for a high-traffic, multilingual public-sector media platform. Streaming, accessibility, the kind of place where things have to just work.

items.name: Aesthetic clinic system
items.blurb: Full-stack booking + patient management with secure medical data handling.

items.name: Mystery shopping platform
items.blurb: Task management, reporting and analytics for a mystery shopping company.

items.name: Manufacturing intranet mobile app
items.blurb: Cross-platform internal app for company comms and employee management at a large manufacturer.

items.name: 60+ WordPress & multiple Magento stores
items.blurb: The biggest chunk of the last decade. Custom themes, custom plugins, performance work on commercial sites that have to convert.
